signals.headline: XRP Briefly Touched $1
signals.raw:
XRP Briefly Touched $1.50 on April 17** | YES | HIGH confidence
XRP reached $1.51094 intraday on April 17, 2026—the first time the token touched that level since February[6]. Notably, this rally was driven by spot ETF inflows ($224 million in the first week of April) rather than retail futures speculation, which historically has been less durable[6].
